zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend Joseph Browne於1561年4月出生在英國素瑞霍利時，他的父親William Browne27歲，母親Magdalene Elsick23歲。他於1584年2月15日與Margery Patching在英國素瑞霍利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1590年在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可盧斯被列為rector。他去世於1633年10月15日在英國英格蘭素可盧斯享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可盧斯聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend Joseph Browne于1561年4月出生在英国素瑞霍利时，他的父亲William Browne27岁，母亲Magdalene Elsick23岁。他于1584年2月15日与Margery Patching在英国素瑞霍利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1590年在英国英格兰韋斯特 素可盧斯被列为rector。他去世于1633年10月15日在英国英格兰素可盧斯享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 素可盧斯聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend Joseph Browne was born in April 1561, in Horley, Surrey, England, his father, William Browne, was 27 and his mother, Magdalene Elsick, was 23. He married Margery Patching on 15 February 1584, in Horley, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1590, his occupation is listed as rector in Rusper, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 15 October 1633, in Rusper, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West: St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend Joseph Browne est né en avril 1561, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William Browne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Magdalene Elsick, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery Patching le 15 février 1584, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1590, sa profession de son indiquée est rector à Rusper, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1633, à Rusper, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend Joseph Browne è nato il nel aprile 1561 nel Horley, Surrey, England, il suo padre, William Browne, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Magdalene Elsick, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margery Patching il 15 febbraio 1584, nel Horley, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1590, la sua occupazione è indicata come rector nel Rusper, West Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 15 ottobre 1633, nel Rusper, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend Joseph Browneが1561年4月にイギリススリーホールリーで生まれた時，父William Browneは27歳，母Magdalene Elsickは23歳であった。1584年2月15日にイギリススリーホールリーでMargery Patchingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1590年，イギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスルスペルでの職業はrectorと記録されている。彼は1633年10月15日にイギリスイギリススセックスルスペルで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスルスペルスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 러스퍼 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Reverend Joseph Browne(이)가 1561년 4월 영국 수리 호를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Browne(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Magdalene Elsick(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1584년 2월 15일 영국 수리 호를리에서 Margery Patching(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1590년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 러스퍼에서 rector이었다. 그는 1633년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 러스퍼에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 러스퍼 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend Joseph Browne nasceu em abril de 1561, em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Browne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Magdalene Elsick, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Patching em 15 de fevereiro de 1584, em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1590, sua profissão aparece como rector em Rusper, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1633, em Rusper, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West: ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, руспир, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend Joseph Browne родился апрель 1561 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени William Browne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdalene Elsick, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Patching 15 февраля 1584 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1590 году он работал по профессии rector в местности руспир, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 15 октября 1633 г. в местности руспир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри магдеилине'с чурч, руспир, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend Joseph Browne nació en abril de 1561, en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, William Browne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Magdalene Elsick, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margery Patching el 15 de febrero de 1584, en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1590, su ocupación registrada era rector en Rusper, West Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1633, en Rusper, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary Magdalene's Church, Rusper, West Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
